_publications._publicationTitle: Medium throughput biochemical compound screening identifies novel agents for pharmacotherapy of neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: only two: Cantharidin and Nifedipine showed consistent significant differences in suppression of NF1-negative versus control MEF cell growth
details: Showed consistent significant differences in suppression versus control MEF cell growth when exposed to Cantharidin and Nifedipine
